channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Carlos Yulo shows support at sibling's house blessing event
item.description: Philippine gymnast and Olympic medalist Carlos Yulo recently attended the house blessing of his siblings, expressing pride in their achievements. The event, which took place in May 2026, saw Yulo offe...

item.title: How Reading Graphic Novels Boosts Literacy Skills in Kids
item.description: Many parents worry if their children only read graphic novels, questioning if it's affecting their literacy. However, research shows that reading graphic novels can actually improve reading and compre...

item.title: Fresh fire reported in Chandni Chowk hours after deadly blaze in Vivek Vihar
item.description: On Sunday, May 3, 2026, Delhi witnessed two significant fire incidents. A fire broke out on the first floor of a residential building in the Chawri Bazaar area of North Delhi’s Chandni Chowk on Sunday...

item.title: Pantami group challenges Gombe APC consensus process, insists on due procedure
item.description: Supporters of former Minister of Communications and Digital Economy, Isa Pantami, under the Pantamiyya Movement, have openly rejected the emergence of Jamilu Gwamna as the All Progressives Congress (A...

item.title: Exploring Whether Fashion Qualifies as Art at the 2026 Met Gala
item.description: The 2026 Met Gala, held on the first Monday in May, continues its tradition of blending celebrity culture, fashion, and art. This year’s theme, 'Costume Art', translates into the dress code 'Fashion i...

item.title: Man intervenes to save elderly victim during knife attack in Golders Green
item.description: A 61-year-old man, Ashkan Asadian, intervened during a violent knife attack on 76-year-old Moshe Shine at a bus stop in Golders Green, north London. Witnessing Shine being stabbed in the neck, Asadian...

item.title: Lukman Criticises Kwankwaso Over Comments on Atiku and ADC Primary Process
item.description: Salihu Lukman, one big member of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), don come out to criticise former Kano State governor, Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, over him comments about internal party politics and ...

item.title: CSC grants additional points to qualified OFWs in civil service exams starting August 2026
item.description: The Civil Service Commission (CSC) has introduced a new preference rating for qualified overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) who are taking the civil service examination (CSE), starting with the test sche...

item.title: Dog Meets AI Robot Dog in London Park: A Hilarious Encounter
item.description: In a quirky encounter on the streets of west London's Holland Park, a real dog found itself confronted by a motorised, AI-powered robot dog. The footage, which quickly went viral, shows the dog barkin...

item.title: Individual faces several charges for allegedly assaulting police during Manila rally
item.description: Authorities from the Manila Police District (MPD) announced that a man who allegedly punched a police officer during a Labor Day rally in Manila is now facing multiple legal charges. The incident, whi...

item.title: Eric M. Roher, Esteemed Toronto Lawyer and Holy Blossom Temple President, Dies at 71
item.description: Eric M. Roher, a senior partner at Borden Ladner Gervais and a leading authority in Canadian education law, passed away in Toronto on April 23, 2026, at the age of 71 following a battle with cancer. A...

item.title: Arsenal, Man City and Man United Secure Champions League Qualification
item.description: As the English Premier League dey enter the final stretch, three top clubs don officially secure their places for next season UEFA Champions League. Arsenal dey top with 76 points after 35 matches, wh...

item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a red alert for most parts of Delhi early on Monday, warning citizens of severe thunderstorms, hailstorms, dust storms, moderate rainfall, and gust...

item.title: Teboho Mokoena's agent shuts down Al Ahly transfer rumours

item.title: Concerns Over Insufficient Oversight of AI Facial Recognition Technology in the UK
item.description: Biometrics watchdogs in the UK have raised alarms about the insufficient regulation of AI-powered facial recognition technology, warning that national oversight has not kept pace with its rapid adopti...

item.title: Durban City goalkeeper Darren Keet retires after Nedbank Cup triumph
item.description: Durban City’s veteran goalkeeper Darren Keet has announced he will retire at the end of the current season, choosing to bow out on a high note after helping his team secure the Nedbank Cup title again...

item.title: Kano APC Leaders Endorse Jibrin, Doguwa for 2027 Senate and House of Reps Elections
item.description: For Kano, the APC stakeholders dem don officially endorse the Deputy Senate President, Barau Jibrin, for reelection come 2027. The committee wey represent all 13 local government areas for Kano North ...

item.title: Researchers Investigate Natural Sugar 2dDR for Potential Hair Regrowth
item.description: Male pattern baldness affects roughly half of all men, yet only two FDA-approved treatments currently exist. Recent research from the University of Sheffield and COMSATS University Pakistan suggests t...

item.title: Assembly election results from five states indicate national political trends
item.description: The assembly elections in five Indian states—West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry—are expected to offer insights into the national political climate. In West Bengal, BJP is attemptin...

item.title: An Oakland Party Experiments with Equalizing Guests’ Heights Using Custom Platform Shoes
item.description: In Oakland, artist Lucian Novosel hosted a unique social experiment known as a 'same-height party,' inspired by German artist Hans Hemmert's 1997 installation 'Level.' The event aimed to equalize all ...
